creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #6)
Yes, that is precisely the point, you want to use libc++ headers and libraries.

You can use g++ as a compiler, but you should *not* use libstdc++ with it. That is, unless you can ensure 100% that no C++ code compiled for libc++ and libstdc++ ever mix. Which definitely is not the case for this port...
